visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark hair and soft makeup appears in a medium close-up, wearing a vibrant pink sequined dress with thin straps. She stands in a brightly lit indoor room with a plain white wall and a shelf holding several neutral-colored hats in the background. She looks directly at the camera with a subtle, expectant facial expression. (2) The woman leans forward significantly toward the camera lens, shifting into a closer framing. Her expression transforms into a wide, bright smile that reveals her teeth, and her eyes crinkle slightly. As she leans in, pink text overlays begin to appear sequentially in the center-left of the screen. The handheld camera exhibits minor, natural stabilization movements throughout the duration of her address.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 過年. (2) [Subtitle]: 有沒有空. (3) [Subtitle]: 來我家. (4) [Subtitle]: 看奶奶. (5) [Subtitle]: 啊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator filming in a selfie perspective.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink sequined cocktail dress and makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with a white wall and a surface or shelf behind the subject where several wide-brimmed straw or felt hats are placed.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks Mandarin Chinese with a clear and upbeat delivery, beginning with a greeting about the New Year. The pitch is moderate, and the tone is casual and welcoming. There is very low-level indoor background ambience, but the voice remains highly intelligible. (2) As the speech continues with a series of questions, the speaker's intonation becomes more modulated and teasing. The speech rate remains steady, but the pitch contours shift into a playful, rising pattern toward the end of the phrase. (3) The final portion of the speech features a high-arousal delivery with a slight vocal brighten and a melodic rise, ending with an expressive particle that suggests a teasing or flirtatious intent.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a playful and slightly suggestive New Year's greeting. The creator uses a double entendre involving a request to visit her house to 'see grandma' (which in Chinese slang can refer to breasts), aiming to engage her audience through humor and flirtatious interaction.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical short-form social media video relying on visual proximity and linguistic double entendre for engagement.
